ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Of The Estate
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Continued To Jun-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the Administrator to appear on June 19, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

05/23/19: Petition for approval of report on status of administration filed. The order to appear will not be issued.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Of The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Continued To May-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Franceschini for Hiram Woo (Administrator).

Mr. Franceschini stated that they do not have the inventory and appraisal completed, that the issue is getting the assets appraised by the Referee, that they were missing two leases that are controlled by third parties who have been hostile, that they got the last one yesterday and that hopefully they can now get the assets appraised. Status on close of estate is continued to May 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed by that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell appeared by telephone for Hiram Woo (Administrator).

The Court stated that it is still looking for an inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution. Mr. Gruwell stated that he has submitted materials to the Probate Referee on two occasions, but they had been rejected (Referee believed the documents regarding the Nevada LLC were not sufficient), and that he has a vast majority of the documents, but there is one entity with challenges from whom he needs to obtain a copy of the lease and he may have to subpoena them. Mr. Gruwell also stated that it is his understanding that there are five entities, that many documents have been received, that they have made diligent efforts, that he is not as familiar with this case as Mr. Franceschini was, that he is not aware of a trust and that he does not note any mention of a trust in any of the documents. In addition, Mr. Gruwell stated that in the August filing they estimated it would take eight months (late February) to close out the estate given the hostile party. The Court stated that it will consider taking this petition off calendar and having Counsel file a new petition in February. Mr. Gruwell stated that he prefers that the Court approve this petition. The Court stated that if it approves this petition, that means the estate will be completed in April. Mr. Gruwell stated that he believes this will work and that they have a very limited amount of documents to retrieve. The Petition to Approve Status of Administration is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Continued To Dec-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-23-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Continued To Aug-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Franceschini for Hiram Woo (Administrator).

Mr. Franceschini stated that he is having trouble getting the property valued by the Referee, that the Referee needs additional documents and that the Referee will need 60-days. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution is continued to August 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration as directed by the Court.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Of The Estate
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Continued To Aug-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Franceschini for Hiram Woo

Mr. Franceschini stated that the estate consists of 4 entity interests, they are having a delay in getting the accounting from 3rd party, Ron Lachman (in Nevada), who runs the out of state interest, and has threatened legal action. Mr. Franceschini also stated that the Probate Referee will issue a subpoena of records for bank accounts and income/expense statements, there are no cash assets, all assets are held in the Trust, and requested a 3 month continuance to file an inventory and appraisal. The Status Hearing on Filing Petition for Final Distribution is continued to August 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Continued To Nov-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
